title: stachys iberica
intro: Stachys iberica, also known as Iberian betony, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of the Balkans and Turkey. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stachys iberica include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of digestive issues such as bloating and cramps. Stachys iberica can be prepared into teas, infusions, tinctures, and capsules, making it easily accessible for those seeking to harness its medicinal properties.
